0.details:
Asking how they are
Not having job right now, but feeling happy about it
Trying to write a book
Thinking about coming back to an old office
Thinking about going abroad
Being obsessed about "The Long Walk" once again
0.model_generation:
Hello!

I hope you’re doing well and life has been treating you kindly. It’s been a strange period for me—I’m between jobs at the moment, which surprisingly feels liberating rather than stressful. I’ve finally found the time and headspace to start writing a book. I’m exploring themes of memory and travel, and it’s exciting to see characters take shape, even if it’s still messy. Some days I’m tempted to return to my old office, if only for the familiar buzz of coworkers. Other days, I’m daydreaming about packing my bags and heading abroad for a fresh perspective. On top of all that, I’m obsessively re-reading The Long Walk again—it never fails to grip me. I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to lately, whether work has been keeping you busy or you’ve taken some new adventures. Let’s catch up soon—maybe over a call or coffee. Take care and talk soon!
0.final_version:
Hiya!

What's up? It’s been a strange period for me—I’m between jobs at the moment, which surprisingly feels liberating rather than stressful. I finally have enough of time to try writing a book. It's mostly about memories and how we look at past from the distance. I'm pretty excited! Some days I’m tempted to return to my old office, it was pretty comfortable life. It was the best office you could have, for real! Other days, I’m daydreaming about packing my bags and heading abroad for an adventure. Just to experience something new, see new places... What's else... Recently I've seen "The Long Walk" movie and got obsessed again. I’m re-reading book again—this history is  still big part of me. What you’ve been up to lately?

edits.removed: I hope you’re doing well and life has been treating you kindly
ravel, and it’s exciting to see characters take shape, even if it’s still messy
if only for the familiar buzz of coworkers
t never fails to grip me
whether work has been keeping you busy or you’ve taken some new adventures. Let’s catch up soon—maybe over a call or coffee. Take care and talk soon!

1.details:
I met groom in foster family when we were kids
He met his husband in the prison
They had troubled life, but thankfully after some years they got all figured out
Now they have honest jobs
1.model_generation: Tonight, we celebrate not just the union of two loving hearts, but the extraordinary journey we’ve witnessed. From the very first afternoon in our foster home, his laughter lit up every room. Even as he navigated harsh hallways and uncertain nights, he never lost his spark. Years later, behind prison walls, he found a partner whose quiet strength matched his own, and together they forged a bond that transformed hardship into hope. They rebuilt their lives with courage, faith, and unwavering determination, trading old struggles for honest work and shared dreams of a brighter tomorrow. Today, as they stand side by side, we celebrate resilience, love, and the promise of new beginnings. May your days be filled with laughter, kindness, and the same fierce devotion that carries you here tonight. To a lifetime of joy, growth, and endless adventure. Here’s to love without limits.
1.final_version: Tonight, we celebrate not just the union of two loving hearts, but the extraordinary journey we’ve witnessed. From the very first afternoon in our foster home, his laughter lit up every room. Even as he navigated harsh hallways and uncertain nights, he never lost his spark. Peric met Wombat in the prison. Even though they once lived their lives on the verge of the society, now they are welcomed by society again. Today, as they stand side by side, we celebrate resilience, love, and the promise of new beginnings. May your days be filled with laughter, kindness, and the same fierce devotion that carries you here tonight. To a lifetime of joy, growth, and endless adventure. Here’s to love without limits.

edits.removed: Years later, behind prison walls, he found a partner whose quiet strength matched his own, and together they forged a bond that transformed hardship into hope
They rebuilt their lives with courage, faith, and unwavering determination, trading old struggles for honest work and shared dreams of a brighter tomorrow

2.details:
it's about looking for new job after losing old one
for sure you'll find one sooner or later
maybe it'll be even better job that old one
I'll support you all the time and you don't have to worry about finances
2.model_generation: You may be feeling discouraged right now after losing your job, but I truly believe this is the start of a new chapter. You have so many talents, so much determination, and experiences that any company would be lucky to welcome on their team. The right opportunity is out there, and I’m confident you’ll find it sooner than you think—maybe even better than the last. While you’re searching, please lean on me for anything you need. You don’t have to worry about finances right now because I will support you every step of the way. Stay positive, keep networking, and trusting your skills. I’m right here cheering you on and ready to help whenever you need it. Better days are coming, and I know you will thrive in whatever comes next. Remember, every challenge is an opportunity, and I know you’ll come out stronger and happier than ever.
2.final_version: V, I know you feel bad right now after losing your job, but I truly believe this is the start of a new chapter. You have so many talents, so much determination, and experiences that any company would be lucky to welcome on their team. The right opportunity is out there, and I’m confident you’ll find it sooner than you think—maybe even better than the last. While you’re searching, please lean on me for anything you need. You don’t have to worry about finances right now because I will support you every step of the way. So please cheer up and enjoy your free time hehe. I’m right here cheering you on and ready to help whenever you need it. Better days are coming, and I know you will thrive in whatever comes next. Remember, every challenge is an opportunity, and I know you’ll come out stronger and happier than ever.

3.details:
I'm thanking my friend Ray
he helped my bofriend who lost himself in the night after party at the bar
it could ended bad
Gary is also thankful, but embarassed
3.model_generation:
Dear Ray,

I can’t thank you enough for stepping in when Gary wandered off after the party at the bar last weekend. It was terrifying not knowing where he was, and I’m so relieved you found him and made sure he got home safely. Your quick thinking and genuine concern likely prevented a much worse situation. You handled everything with calm and kindness, and we won’t forget how much you cared.

Gary asked me to pass along his gratitude as well, though he’s far too embarrassed to say it himself. Please know how much this means to us. We owe you more than words can say, and I hope we can find a way to repay you for what you did. Your friendship and support at that moment truly made all the difference, and we’re both lucky to have you in our lives.

Thank you again for being there when we needed you most.
3.final_version:
Dear Ray,

I can’t thank you enough for stepping in when Gary wandered off after the party at the bar last weekend. It was terrifying not knowing where he was, and I’m so relieved you found him and made sure he got home safely. I'm afraid what could happen if you didn't find him. You're such a great friend and a person, always kind and caring!

Gary asked me to pass along his gratitude as well, though he’s far too embarrassed to say it himself. Maybe we'll go to dinner this week together? 

Thank you again for being such good friend.

edits.removed: Your quick thinking and genuine concern likely prevented a much worse situation
ou handled everything with calm and kindness, and we won’t forget how much you cared.

Please know how much this means to us. We owe you more than words can say, and I hope we can find a way to repay you for what you did. Your friendship and support at that moment truly made all the difference, and we’re both lucky to have you in our lives.
here when we needed you most.

4.details:
I'm marrying Gary
we've been together for a 10 years
our relationship was firstly somehow tumultous
but after some time we figured it out
we enjoy walking together and baking cakes
4.model_generation:
Gary, ten years ago we embarked on an adventure that tested us from the start. Our journey has been a tapestry of soaring highs and rocky lows, but with each step we learned to communicate, to forgive, and to grow stronger together. Today, I stand before you with gratitude for every laughter-filled walk through the park, every imperfect cake we baked side by side, and every moment that led us here.

Gary, I promise to be your partner in adventure, your confidant when life feels uncertain, and your biggest supporter in every dream you chase. I vow to keep baking sweetness into our days, to walk beside you through calm and storm, and to cherish your laugh, your kindness, and your unwavering love. With you, I have found home. Today, I choose you again and always, for the lifetime of walks, cakes, and love yet to come.
4.final_version:
Dear Garry,
Today we're standing here together ready to be married. We've been together already for a 10 years - so long! Times flies so fast! I still remember our first meeting - it feels like it was just yesterday. It was our first day in the high school and we were both so afraid and uncertain of the future... But after that we found great comfort in each other company. Our first years together were somewhat tumultous, but after some time we figured it out and learned better how to take care of us and how to live together. Now I cannot imagine my life without you. Gary, you're love of my life and I'm happy to become your husband. You have always had my back. I promise to take care of you till I die. You're the best what ever happend to me. I love you.

5.details:
sorry Bart
I was angry at you and I broke windshield in your car
It was very immature of me and my mom asked me to write this letter
I'll pay for your new windshield
5.model_generation:
Dear Bart,

I want to apologize for breaking the windshield on your car. I let my anger get the better of me, and my reaction was immature and unacceptable. You did nothing to deserve that damage, and I feel deeply ashamed. My mom insisted I write this letter to convey how truly sorry I am for hurting you and for ruining your property. I take full responsibility for my actions and will cover the entire cost of installing a new windshield. Please know that I value our friendship and regret causing you this inconvenience and stress. I promise to handle my emotions better in the future and to make amends wherever I can. I understand if you need time to trust me again, and I will respect your feelings and space as you process what happened. Thank you for considering my apology, and I hope we can move past this together.

Sincerely,
Your friend
5.final_version:
Dear Bart,
I am very, very sorry about my behaviour. What I did was truly unacceptable. I really shouldn't got so mad at you. I was so angry about you being late constantly that I broke windshield in your car out of rage. It was really awful thing to do. It is true, you shouldn't be late everyday, you know how I hate being late to school. But it is not explanation for my beahviour. Also it was nice of you anyway to pick me up every morning before school. It was very immature to behave like I did and my mom made me to write this apology letter. Of course I'll pay for your new windshield. Once again, I'm truly sorry and I hope you'll forgive me and we can be friends again. We had so much fun, remember? You, me and V - 3 musketeers!
